summary: Dashboard role-based filtering tested and verified. All 7 features working correctly: Admin/gestor_desportivo see ALL events, Players see ONLY their team events, Parent sees ONLY linked child's team events. No data leaks detected.

admin_sees_all_events.description: Admin sees ALL club events (both Escolares and Sub-13)
admin_sees_all_events.verified: Dashboard shows events from both teams including 'Treino Sub-13 Test'

gestor_desportivo_sees_all_events.description: gestor_desportivo sees ALL club events (same as admin)
gestor_desportivo_sees_all_events.verified: Dashboard shows 5 events including 'Treino Sub-13 Test' from Sub-13 team

player_escolares_sees_only_escolares.description: Player in Escolares team sees ONLY Escolares events
player_escolares_sees_only_escolares.verified: Dashboard shows 5 events, all from Escolares team. No Sub-13 events visible.

player_sub13_sees_only_sub13.description: Player in Sub-13 team sees ONLY Sub-13 events
player_sub13_sees_only_sub13.verified: Dashboard shows 1 event: 'Treino Sub-13 Test'. Teams count: 1

parent_sub13_sees_only_child_events.description: Parent linked to Sub-13 player sees ONLY Sub-13 events
parent_sub13_sees_only_child_events.verified: Dashboard shows 1 event: 'Treino Sub-13 Test'. Teams count: 1

no_data_leak_escolares_to_sub13.description: Escolares player cannot see Sub-13 events
no_data_leak_escolares_to_sub13.verified: No Sub-13 events visible in Escolares player dashboard

teams_count_correct.description: Teams count is correct for each role
teams_count_correct.verified: Admin/Gestor: 2+ teams, Players: 1 team, Parent: 1 team (child's)

api_dashboard_filtering.player: Returns only events where team_id in user.team_ids
api_dashboard_filtering.parent: Returns only events where team_id in linked_player.team_ids

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard endpoint correctly uses is_admin_role() to check for admin/gestor_desportivo
Parent filtering correctly uses linked_player_ids and linked_player_id to get child's teams
Frontend Dashboard.jsx correctly uses dashboardApi.get() without manual filtering - relies on backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard role-based filtering fully tested. Backend filters events based on user role: Admin/gestor_desportivo see all, Players see their team events, Parents see linked children's team events. Test accounts: player.escolares@test.com (Escolares team), player.sub13@test.com (Sub-13 team), parent.sub13@test.com (linked to Sub-13 player). All 17 pytest tests pass.
